production_blockers.remediation: Switched from auto-completion to 'Work Order' issuance in backend hooks. Endpoint check-pending eliminated.
Implement backend PDF generation for signed bitacora entries.

production_blockers.issue: Missing UI Reactive Block based on Quotas (Plan Store)

Finance module needs strict linkage with Bitacora (Cosechas/Ventas) and legal SRI export format. E2E flow is broken without it.
Schedule alarms/cronjobs for Reminders are not emitting actual async notifications (push/email). Only local state exists.
